page.title: Progression mode library
page.description: Curate your work's progression modes here — e.g. system-driven, invincible MC, slice-of-life cultivation, healing slice-of-life. It answers "what keeps this book moving and paying off" and feeds as a hard constraint into later planning and generation.
page.emptyDescription: You can hand-build a root mode, or let AI draft a structured starter for you.

toast.createdChildren: Created {{count}} child progression modes in bulk.
toast.childCandidatesGenerated: AI drafted {{count}} child progression mode candidates.
toast.treeGenerated: AI progression mode tree draft is ready.

confirm.deleteWithDescendants: Delete progression mode "{{name}}"? This also removes its {{count}} sub-modes and cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteSingle: Delete progression mode "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

errors.missingParent: Parent progression mode no longer exists.
errors.selectChildCandidate: Please pick at least one child candidate.

createDialog.descriptionChild: Adds a child under the chosen parent. You can either fill it in manually or let AI draft multiple child candidates based on the parent and its existing siblings, then bulk-save your picks.
createDialog.descriptionRoot: Pick the mount point first, then fill in the profile manually or let AI draft a two-level tree.
createDialog.rootMountLabel: Create as a root progression mode
createDialog.aiHintChild: AI will produce one or more child node drafts based on the parent and existing siblings — it will not regenerate the whole tree. Direction prompt is optional. Profile structure is still validated before saving.
createDialog.aiHintRoot: AI returns an editable progression mode tree draft. Profile structure is still validated before saving.
createDialog.generatingPlaceholderChild: Optional: nudge the direction you want for the child. Leave blank to let AI derive purely from the parent and existing siblings.
createDialog.generatingPlaceholderRoot: Describe the progression mode tree direction you want to generate.
createDialog.candidatesHint: Tick to bulk-save; click a candidate card to load it into the form below for individual editing.

editDialog.title: Edit progression mode
editDialog.description: Adjust name, description, template and profile. The two-level tree constraint still applies.

treeCard.deleteBlockedTitle: Unbind novels referencing this mode or its children before deleting.
